reviews.comment:
No tienen posnet desde diciembre! Acorde a lo que informan los playeros, esa sería la razón para NO CARGARME LOS PUNTOS DE YPF SERVICLUB!?!?

(Translated by Google)
They haven't had a POS terminal since December! According to the gas station attendants, that would be the reason why I'm not getting my YPF Serviclub points credited!?!?

No me cargaron los puntos YPF porque supuestamente no anda el sistema.. por lo demás bien.. mejor que la esso que nos estafaron ( el surtido muestra mayor cantidad de combustible)

(Translated by Google)
They didn't charge me YPF points because the system supposedly doesn't work...otherwise it's fine...better than the Esso they scammed us with (the fuel gauge shows a higher amount of fuel)
